You are hungry! Let's cook a delicious meal. Check the cookbook in the kitchen for the recipe. Once done, enjoy your meal!

-= Kitchen =-
Of every kitchen you could have sauntered into, you had to show up in an ordinary one.

You make out a fridge. You can make out an oven. You lean against the wall, inadvertently pressing a secret button. The wall opens up to reveal a table. But the thing is empty. You swear loudly. You see a counter. On the counter you make out a cookbook and a knife. You bend down to tie your shoe. When you stand up, you notice a stove. But the thing is empty, unfortunately.
